## UpdateAgentInput variable

Zod schema for updating an existing agent. All fields are optional for partial updates.

**Signature:**

```typescript
UpdateAgentInput: z.ZodObject<
	{
		agentCompanyId: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodString>
		suffix: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodOptional<z.ZodEnum<['Jr', 'Sr', 'II', 'III', 'IV', 'V', 'MD', 'PhD', 'Esq']>>
		>
		firstName: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>
		>
		lastName: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>>
		preferredName: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>>
		>
		email: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Email'>>>
		birthDate: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'DateOnlyISO'>>
		>
	},
	'strict',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		email?: (string & z.BRAND<'Email'>) | undefined
		agentCompanyId?: string | undefined
		firstName?: (string & z.BRAND<'Name'>) | undefined
		lastName?: (string & z.BRAND<'Name'>) | undefined
		preferredName?: (string & z.BRAND<'Name'>) | undefined
		suffix?: 'Jr' | 'Sr' | 'II' | 'III' | 'IV' | 'V' | 'MD' | 'PhD' | 'Esq' | undefined
		birthDate?: (string & z.BRAND<'DateOnlyISO'>) | undefined
	},
```
